articles.title: Tell Your Troubles to the Iceman
Guide Lessons for October - Lesson III - Literature
articles.notes: The PDF images show Guide Lessons for September, not October. The visible lessons are for September and include Lesson I (Theology and Testimony - The Abrahamic Dispensation Part II - Isaac) and Lesson II (Work and Business). There is also a Lesson III (Literature) about Eugene Field, but this is for September, not October as specified in the search criteria.

articles.title: Guide Lessons for October - Lesson IV - Social Service
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (432-436) contain 'Notes from the Field', a poem 'The Sabbath Sun Serenely Falls', and 'Guide Lessons for September' (Lessons I and II covering Theology/Testimony and Work/Business topics). The October Guide Lessons, specifically Lesson IV on Social Service, are not present in these pages.
